ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contributor (e.g., individual, organization, bot) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the contributor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the contributor */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geographical location of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* The GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* The LinkedIn profile URL of the contributor */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* The GitHub profile URL of the contributor */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date when the contributor joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the contributor is currently active */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* The date of the last activity by the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, issue) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the contribution */,
  "pull_request_number" INTEGER /* The pull request number (if applicable) */,
  "issue_number" INTEGER /* The issue number (if applicable) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* The status of the contribution review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* The date when the contribution was merged (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contribution_type FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_type") REFERENCES contribution_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the project is released */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* The URL of the project's repository */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the project was last updated */,
  "maintainers" TEXT /* A list of maintainer IDs (could be a separate table or a comma-separated list) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* A list of tags or keywords associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the contribution type is currently active */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The date when the contribution type was last used */,
  "example" TEXT /* An example of what this contribution type might look like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "rank_number" INTEGER /* Rank number of the contributor */,
  "contributions" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the contributor */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of total contributions made by the contributor */,
  "cumulative_sum" INTEGER /* Cumulative sum of contributions up to the contributor's rank */,
  "cumulative_percent" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of contributions up to the contributor's rank */,
  "all_contributions" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions across all contributors */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project for which the ranking is specific */,
  "rank_period" TEXT /* The period for which the ranking is calculated (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* The change in rank compared to the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_ranks_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_ranks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the award */,
  "awarded_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the entity that awarded it (could be another contributor or an organization) */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the award (e.g., code, documentation, community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_awarded_by FOREIGN KEY ("awarded_by") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who set the goal */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the goal is related to */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, achieved) */,
  "progress" TEXT /* The current progress towards the goal (e.g., 50%) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the goal was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the badge */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the badge (e.g., code, documentation, community) */,
  "badge_url" TEXT /* The URL of the badge image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the leaderboard is for */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the contributor on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the contributor on the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_period" TEXT /* The period for which the leaderboard is specific (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "total_contributions" INTEGER /* The total number of contributions by the contributor */,
  "average_contributions" REAL /* The average number of contributions per day/week/month */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* The date of the last contribution by the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., activity, performance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* The period for which the report is specific (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* The URL where the report can be accessed */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors_projects" (
  "contributor_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a contributor and a project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the contributor in the project (e.g., developer, tester, maintainer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_projects_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors_awards" (
  "contributor_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a contributor and an award */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "awarded_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the entity that awarded it (could be another contributor or an organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_awards_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_awards_awarded_by FOREIGN KEY ("awarded_by") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors_goals" (
  "contributor_goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a contributor and a goal */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "progress" TEXT /* The current progress towards the goal (e.g., 50%) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_goals_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_goals_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors_badges" (
  "contributor_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a contributor and a badge */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the badge (e.g., code, documentation, community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_badges_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors_leaderboards" (
  "contributor_leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a contributor and a leaderboard entry */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard entry */,
  "leaderboard_period" TEXT /* The period for which the leaderboard is specific (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_leaderboards_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_leaderboards_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)
